interpretation_summary: Screen interaction/state events; proxy for phone engagement timing.
data_quality_concerns: Screen state semantics can vary by OS/device; not equal to active cognition.

interpretation_summary: Foreground app events; proxy for app-use behavior and routine.
data_quality_concerns: Foreground does not equal intentional use; system/app noise present.

interpretation_summary: Keyboard interactions; proxy for active text input behavior.
data_quality_concerns: Keyboard provider/settings affect logs; privacy-safe aggregation only.

interpretation_summary: Touch interactions; broad proxy for phone interaction volume.
data_quality_concerns: Touch event granularity differs across devices/apps.

interpretation_summary: Model-derived physical activity states over time.
data_quality_concerns: Activity labels are classifier outputs and device/model dependent.

interpretation_summary: Cellular context and tower-level mobility proxy.
data_quality_concerns: Network infrastructure differences can bias comparability.

interpretation_summary: Cellular context and tower-level mobility proxy.
data_quality_concerns: Network infrastructure differences can bias comparability.

interpretation_summary: Telephony/network state context, not direct behavior alone.
data_quality_concerns: More state than action; combine with behavioral tables.

interpretation_summary: Messaging events; proxy for social communication activity.
data_quality_concerns: Sparse coverage in current top10; direction/type may be limited.

interpretation_summary: System/data-sync logs used as denominator and quality flag source.
data_quality_concerns: Not a phenotype endpoint; interpret only as data quality context.
